data.body: Fun fact: In North Korea, if you are allowed a computer at all, it must be registered to your name with the local police. The OS takes screenshots of your desktop at random points, and the police come regularly to check them and make sure you’re not up to anything unpatriotic. Don’t emulate N. Korea
